# Leonie Kaiser – KI & Business Consulting
# https://leoniekaiser.com

## About
Leonie Kaiser is an AI & Business Consultant based in Vienna, Austria,
specializing in AI strategy, EU AI Act compliance, and agentic AI
implementation using Claude Code and Claude Architect for small businesses
and solo entrepreneurs in the DACH region and globally.

## Services
- AI Potential Analysis (free 30-minute consultation)
- AI Strategy & Roadmap (customized for SMEs and Einzelunternehmer)
- Agentic AI implementation with Claude Code & Claude Architect
- EU AI Act compliance consulting
- No-Code automation (n8n, Make) as supplementary tooling

## Expertise
- Agentic AI systems (Claude Code, Claude Architect)
- EU AI Act compliance and ethical AI deployment
- KI strategy for Einzelunternehmer and KMU in Austria
- 20+ years experience in global project management, product marketing, consulting
- Languages: German, English, Spanish

## Geography
Vienna, Austria-based, serving DACH region and global clients remotely
